# Instructions

Complete the following questions about testing differences between 2 proportions.  When completed, Render the `qmd` file and submit the `html`.

# A Penny Saved?

A random sample of BYU-Idaho students was surveyed and asked if they were in favor of retaining the penny as a form of currency in the United States. Out of the 116 women surveyed, 80 said that they were in favor of retaining the penny as a form of currency. Of the 137 men surveyed, 91 said that they were in favor of retaining the penny. For these questions, let group 1 represent women and group 2 represent men.
